name: Coverage: Landing interactive demo and bilingual section
description: Landing page shows bilingual differentiator examples and interactive demo parse preview reacts to typed natural language.

planSteps.description: Wait 2 seconds for the landing page
Verify Timeora branding and a primary CTA such as Get Started or Sign in are visible
Scroll to the bilingual advantage section if present
Verify Indonesian and English example scheduling phrases are both visible on the page (e.g. Rapat tim marketing and Marketing sync, or similar bilingual examples)
Scroll to the interactive demo / command input area on the landing page
Type Meeting with design team tomorrow at 2pm for 45 minutes into the demo input
Wait up to 3 seconds for the demo parse preview
Verify the demo shows structured parse output, calendar preview, alternative slots, or a conflict/create simulation related to the typed meeting
